_comment: TRUE POSITIVE — SP-800001: Canary Honeypot-Dokument geöffnet
scenario: Attacker with internal access opens a honeypot document placed in a network share. Zero false positives when canary is properly placed.
deployment_note: Canary document 'Q3 Financial CONFIDENTIAL.xlsx' placed in \\FILESERVER01\Finance\Confidential. No legitimate business need to open this file — any access is malicious.

enrichment.note: IT Support Technician has no business reason to access Finance Confidential documents

why_tp: File was deliberately placed as a deception asset — no legitimate use case
User's department (IT Operations) has no need for Finance Confidential documents
Access via Excel (not a copy operation) — suggests targeted review of content
analyst_action: Interview jsmith immediately — determine if account is compromised or insider threat
Review jsmith's recent file access history (last 24–48h) for lateral movement signs
Check if other canary assets were accessed by the same account
If compromise confirmed: isolate workstation and escalate to L3

deception_deployment_guide.placement: High-value shares: Finance, HR, Executive, IT-Admin, Backup
deception_deployment_guide.acl: Everyone: Read (intentionally open — should never be touched)
deception_deployment_guide.monitoring: Audit policy must log Object Access (Success) for the share path
